_comment: Events are transient and add color. Conditions (war, plague, etc.) are in modifiers.json and gate availability more structurally.

events.label: Harvest Festival
events.note: Harvest stalls crowd the square. Cider flows cheap tonight.

events.label: Market Day
events.note: Fresh goods crowd the inn kitchen — the cook bought in bulk.

events.label: Merchant Caravan
events.note: A southern caravan passed through. Strange spices on offer.

events.label: Noble Visit
events.note: A lord rests here tonight. The kitchen has been put to the test.

events.label: Hunters Return
events.note: Game hangs thick in the larder.

events.label: Good Catch
events.note: The boats came in heavy. Fish is cheap and fresh.

events.label: Religious Fast
events.note: No meat tonight. The kitchen keeps the calendar.
